key_risks: Hawkish FOMC surprise on June 17 reversing rate-cut hopes
Semiconductor momentum reversal or AI capex disappointment
Hot June retail sales or PCE re-igniting inflation fears
Geopolitical shock hitting Taiwan/semi supply chains

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex tailwind, ISM new orders surge, Taiwan/Korea export strength confirm chip cycle.
Best risk-adjusted trend; benefits from softening core CPI, dovish FOMC tilt, falling yields.
Yields dropping sharply (2Y -8bps, 10Y -10bps), VIX falling, ISM expanding - small caps benefit from easing financial conditions.
Steepening curve, strong ISM, falling rates aid NIM and credit; strong recent momentum.
Semi supply chain leverage, exceptional 6m/1y returns reflect AI demand continuing into Q2 earnings.

portfolio_rationale: Cooling core inflation (0.2% MoM) with strong ISM expansion and falling yields supports a pro-cyclical, AI-tilted risk-on stance into FOMC. Semis/momentum lead; small caps and regionals benefit from rates relief.
rationale_summary: Goldilocks setup: disinflation + growth resilience + falling yields favors risk assets, especially AI/semis and rate-sensitive cyclicals over the one-month window.
